name: Ajay Kumar Mandal
profileSummary: Ajay Kumar Mandal is an Indian politician and Member of Parliament Lok Sabha. He was elected to the Lok Sabha, lower house of the Parliament of India from Bhagalpur in the 2019 Indian general election and in the 2024 Indian general election as member of the Janata Dal (United). He defeated Rashtriya Janata Dal candidate Shailesh Kumar Mandal by a big margin of 2,77,630 votes. He has been also elected three times for Bihar Legislative Assembly, two times from Nathnagar and one time from Kahalgaon.
